Query.Title: conset_2x
Query.Text: select * from Customer.CustomerConsentUnconfirmed u join Customer.CustomerConsent c on u.CustomerId=c.CustomerId and u.ConsentId=c.ConsentId

Query.Title: customer_email
Query.Text:
select top 1000 c.LastName,c.FirstName,e.Email,c.CreatedAt, e.CustomerId from Customer.CustomerEmail e join Customer.Customer c on e.CustomerId=c.Id
order by c.Id desc

Query.Title: zgody
Query.Text: select cc.Name,cs.ValidFrom,k.LastName from [Customer].[CustomerConsent] cs join Config.Consent cc on cs.ConsentId=cc.Id join Customer.Customer k on cs.CustomerId=k.Id where cs.customerid=1449762 order by cs.ValidFrom desc

Query.Title: zgodyklienta_1449762
Query.Text: select top 1000 * from [Customer].[CustomerConsent] where customerid=1449762 order by 1 desc

Query.Title: unit_key
Query.Text: select k.UnitId,k.[Key],u.Name from unit.UnitApiKey k join Unit.Unit u on k.UnitId=u.Id

Query.Title: linki sms kampanie
Query.Question: Podaj id wiadomosci
